name: Lead Code Generator
script:
# ─── Step 1: Validate Territory ───────────────────────────────
if not doc.territory:
    frappe.throw("Territory is mandatory to generate Lead Code. Please select a Territory.")

if not doc.is_new():
    pass

else:
    # ─── Step 2: Abbreviation Function ────────────────────────
    def get_abbreviation(name):
        words = name.strip().split()

        if len(words) == 1:
            # Single word → first 3 letters
            # "Chemico" → CHE
            return words[0][:3].upper()

        elif len(words) == 2:
            # Two words → first 2 letters of word1 + first letter of word2
            # "Green Life" → GR + L = GRL
            return (words[0][:2] + words[1][0]).upper()

        else:
            # Three or more words → first letter of each word (up to 3)
            # "Bio Actives General" → BAG
            return ''.join(w[0] for w in words[:3]).upper()

    # ─── Step 3: Territory Code Map ───────────────────────────
    territory_codes = {
        # Southeast Asia & East Asia
        "Indonesia":    "ID",
        "Malaysia":     "ML",
        "Myanmar":      "MM",
        "Philippines":  "PL",
        "Singapore":    "SG",
        "Korea":        "KR",
        "Taiwan":       "TW",
        "Thailand":     "TH",
        "Vietnam":      "VN",

        # Middle East & Africa
        "Saudi Arabia": "SA",
        "Qatar":        "QT",
        "Bahrain":      "BR",
        "Oman":         "OM",
        "Kuwait":       "KW",
        "Egypt":        "EG",
        "South Africa": "ZA",
        "Dubai":        "DB",
    }

    # ─── Step 4: Validate Territory is in our list ────────────
    if doc.territory not in territory_codes:
        frappe.throw(f"Territory '{doc.territory}' is not supported. Please select a valid territory.")

    # ─── Step 5: Get Abbreviation ─────────────────────────────
    abbr = get_abbreviation(doc.lead_name)

    # ─── Step 6: Get Territory Code ───────────────────────────
    territory_code = territory_codes[doc.territory]

    # ─── Step 7: Get Next Sequence Number ─────────────────────
    prefix = f"{abbr}-{territory_code}-"

    existing = frappe.db.count("Lead", filters={
        "name": ["like", f"{prefix}%"]
    })

    seq = str(existing + 1).zfill(2)

    # ─── Step 8: Set Final Lead Code ──────────────────────────
    doc.name = f"{prefix}{seq}"
    doc.custom_lead_abbreviation = abbr
